User Story: As a Collection Account Manager, I want to create a new production record with title, type, genre, budget, currency, key personnel, and territory so that all downstream CAM operations are linked to a single production.
As a Collection Account Manager, I want to track production status (development, pre-production, production, post-production, completed, released) so that I can filter and prioritize active projects.
As a Finance Administrator, I want to import multiple productions from a spreadsheet or CSV so that I can onboard a slate of titles quickly.
As a Producer, I want to see all my productions in one dashboard with budget vs. collected revenue so I can track overall portfolio performance.
As a Collection Account Manager, I want to register stakeholders with their role, company, contact info, and encrypted bank details so that disbursements can be processed accurately.
As a Collection Account Manager, I want to link stakeholders to productions with a specific role and participation percentage so the waterfall engine knows who gets what.
As a Financier, I want to view only my own productions, recoupment positions, and statements without seeing other stakeholders' details.
As a Legal Officer, I want to verify that stakeholder bank details are encrypted at rest and that only authorized users can view them.
As a Collection Account Manager, I want to create segregated collection accounts per production with bank details, currency, and status (active/frozen/closed) so that revenue is properly ring-fenced.
As a Collection Account Manager, I want to see real-time balances across all collection accounts in a single dashboard so I can spot issues quickly.
As a Finance Administrator, I want to freeze or close a collection account and prevent further transactions against it.
As a Collection Account Manager, I want to manage multi-currency accounts (USD, EUR, GBP, CAD, AUD, JPY, CNY) and see balances in both local and reporting currencies.

As a Collection Account Manager, I want to define priority-ordered waterfall rules (percentage, fixed, corridor, residual) with caps, floors, and cross-collateralization groups so that revenue is allocated per the contractual agreement.
As a Collection Account Manager, I want to execute a waterfall calculation against incoming revenue and see a detailed breakdown of how each dollar was allocated across priorities.
As a Collection Account Manager, I want to save waterfall templates so I can reuse standard structures across similar productions.
As a Legal Officer, I want to compare the waterfall rules in the system against the original contract terms to verify accuracy.
As a Financier, I want to see my cumulative recoupment position (total owed, total received, outstanding) updated after each waterfall execution.
As a Producer, I want to model what-if scenarios by running the waterfall with hypothetical revenue amounts before actual collections arrive.
As a Collection Account Manager, I want to record incoming payments (inflows) from distributors with amount, currency, source, reference, and description so that all revenue is tracked.
As a Collection Account Manager, I want every transaction to be immutably hash-chained (SHA-256) so that the ledger cannot be tampered with.
As a Finance Administrator, I want to reverse a transaction by creating an offsetting entry (not deleting the original) to maintain audit integrity.
As an External Auditor, I want to verify the hash chain integrity of the entire transaction ledger to confirm no records have been altered.
As a Collection Account Manager, I want to search and filter transactions by production, account, date range, type, and status.
As a Collection Account Manager, I want to automatically generate disbursement records from waterfall execution so that payouts are calculated without manual work.
As a Finance Administrator, I want to approve disbursements before they are processed to maintain control over outflows.
As a Collection Account Manager, I want to track disbursement status (calculated, approved, processing, completed, failed) and see payment references.
As a Stakeholder, I want to receive notification when a disbursement has been processed in my favor.
As a Collection Account Manager, I want to upload a CAMA PDF and have AI extract the parties, waterfall rules, and key terms automatically.
As a Legal Officer, I want to review and approve AI-extracted contract terms before they become active waterfall rules in the system.
As a Collection Account Manager, I want to see a side-by-side view of the original contract text and the AI-extracted data so I can verify accuracy.
As a Finance Administrator, I want to batch-upload multiple contracts and queue them for AI parsing.
As a Collection Account Manager, I want to generate collection account statements showing balances, transaction history, and waterfall positions per production.
As a Financier, I want to receive quarterly recoupment statements showing my position across all my productions.
As a Sales Agent, I want territory-level sales reports showing gross receipts, fees, and net amounts remitted.
As a Finance Administrator, I want to schedule automatic report generation and email delivery on a recurring basis (monthly, quarterly).
As an External Auditor, I want to export the full transaction ledger and waterfall execution history as CSV/PDF for offline review.
As a Collection Account Manager, I want a financial overview dashboard with total collected, total disbursed, and pending amounts across all productions.
As a Sales Agent, I want to track distribution agreements by territory, media type, and deal terms (MG, advance, fee percentage).
As a Collection Account Manager, I want a sales matrix showing which territories are sold vs. available for each production.
As a Collection Account Manager, I want an avails matrix showing which media rights (theatrical, home video, streaming, TV) are available by territory.
As a Sales Agent, I want to track minimum guarantee payments and reconcile them against actual collections.
As a Collection Account Manager, I want AI-generated revenue forecasts for each production based on historical data, genre comparables, and territory analysis.
As a Financier, I want to see projected recoupment timelines based on revenue forecasts so I can plan my cash flow.
As a Producer, I want to compare actual collections against forecasts to understand production performance.
As a Finance Administrator, I want the system to automatically flag duplicate transactions, unusual payment amounts, and timing irregularities.
As a Legal Officer, I want to be alerted when a disbursement violates waterfall rules (e.g., paying more than the cap, skipping a priority).
As a Collection Account Manager, I want to review, investigate, and resolve anomaly alerts with notes and status tracking.
As a Sales Agent, I want to manage distribution deals through a pipeline (lead, negotiation, term sheet, due diligence, closing, closed) so I can track my sales process.
As a Collection Account Manager, I want CRM contacts linked to stakeholder records so that deal contacts automatically become production stakeholders when a deal closes.
As a Sales Agent, I want Kanban and list views of my deal pipeline filtered by territory, deal type, and stage.
As a Collection Account Manager, I want to ask natural-language questions and get instant answers from the AI assistant.
As a Financier, I want to ask the AI about my recoupment position and get a clear answer without navigating multiple screens.
As a Collection Account Manager, I want to execute commands via chat as a power-user shortcut.
As a Finance Administrator, I want a complete audit log of every action (who, what, when, before/after values) for compliance.
As a Legal Officer, I want role-based access control so stakeholders can only see data related to their own productions.
As an External Auditor, I want to verify the integrity of the transaction ledger hash chain and export it for independent review.
As a Finance Administrator, I want all sensitive data encrypted at rest with key rotation capability.
As a Finance Administrator, I want to import transactions from bank statements (CSV/MT940) to reduce manual data entry.
As a Collection Account Manager, I want email notifications when key events occur (payment received, disbursement approved, anomaly detected).
As a Finance Administrator, I want to export data to accounting systems (Xero, QuickBooks, SAP) for general ledger reconciliation.
